response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics for the 'Deal with the devil' performance matched the provided Japanese reference lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the reference JSON for the first segment (00:00 - 02:57), then transitioned to manual transcription for the remainder of the video as the reference did not contain the talk and game segments. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously aligned with the onset of Aki Rosenthal's vocals, using immediate transitions to prevent cascading delays during fast delivery. No CC tags or musical annotations were included, keeping the focus entirely on clear spoken/vocal text.

subtitles.original: 仕掛けて罠に嵌めるわ...
subtitles.english: I'll set a trap and catch you...

subtitles.original: 油断誘うのよ
subtitles.english: I'll tempt you, I'll make you bend.

subtitles.original: 思考を止めたらジ・エンド
subtitles.english: Take time to second guess and it's the end.

subtitles.original: 何にも知らないような表情で...
subtitles.english: I'll play innocent as...

subtitles.original: 堕とすわあなたを
subtitles.english: I bring your world crumbling down.

subtitles.original: 虚勢でしょそれ you doubt me
subtitles.english: That's just a bluff, you doubt me?

subtitles.original: 読み切ってレッツ showdown
subtitles.english: Thought you had me? Let's showdown!

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil 見逃さない
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil, you won't get past me!

subtitles.original: どんな小さなズルだって
subtitles.english: No matter how miniscule the cheat...

subtitles.original: あたしの目はごまかされないわ
subtitles.english: There's nothing these eyes of mine can't see!

subtitles.original: a million dollars i'd say raise
subtitles.english: A million dollars? I'd say raise!

subtitles.original: 勝った相手は骨まで
subtitles.english: I want to conquer you completely...

subtitles.original: 愛しつくしてあげる
subtitles.english: Then I'll love you and you'll never leave me!

subtitles.original: 狙った獲物は逃がさない
subtitles.english: You're my prey and there's no way you'll leave my sight.

subtitles.original: 唇濡らして頂くわ my babe
subtitles.english: Wet my lips and call it fate, my babe.

subtitles.original: ダイヤのジャックで手が揃うわ
subtitles.english: The Jack of Diamonds! This has been worth it.

subtitles.original: 笑みを殺し待つだけ
subtitles.english: I hide my smile and patiently wait.

subtitles.original: あたしのポーカーフェイスは it's perfect
subtitles.english: Can't see through my poker face, why, it's perfect!

subtitles.original: 一分の隙も見せたりしないわ
subtitles.english: It never falters, you're only wasting your time.

subtitles.original: 視線感じてるわ...
subtitles.english: I feel your gaze on my skin...

subtitles.original: お望みは最後まで
subtitles.english: All the desires that you're holding in.

subtitles.original: 見てばっかりいないで
subtitles.english: Why try to save them?

subtitles.original: あたしとしていかない？
subtitles.english: It would be so much fun if you'd play with me.

subtitles.original: 負けるのが怖い？ you're easy game
subtitles.english: So, what, you're scared to lose? You're easy game!

subtitles.original: 読み切ってレッツ showdown
subtitles.english: Thought you had me? Let's showdown!

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil 見透かして
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil, I see your lies.

subtitles.original: あたしのものにする
subtitles.english: No matter the cost, I'll make you mine.

subtitles.original: あなたの髪の一本まで全部
subtitles.english: Down to every hair, I will own you.

subtitles.original: a million dollars i'd say raise
subtitles.english: A million dollars? I'd say raise!

subtitles.original: 震えてるわよ坊や
subtitles.english: I can't stop trembling with excitement!

subtitles.original: とことんまで行くわ
subtitles.english: C'mon boy, let's go until I'm spent!

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil, uhn 興奮
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil, oh, I want more!

subtitles.original: たまらないわスリル
subtitles.english: The endlessly thrilling time in store.

subtitles.original: 誰にも触らせないこの money
subtitles.english: I won't let you touch it, all this money!

subtitles.original: a million dollars i'd say raise
subtitles.english: A million dollars? I'd say raise!

subtitles.original: さあ com'on 覚悟キメて
subtitles.english: So come on, hurry, make your mind up!

subtitles.original: ハイになるまで打って
subtitles.english: Until we hit high, don't you dare stop!

subtitles.original: 欲しがるようじゃねまだベイビー
subtitles.english: Only ever making wishes, you naive baby.

subtitles.original: 誰にも負けない
subtitles.english: No one else can make me feel it.

subtitles.original: 感じさせて love me honey
subtitles.english: Come give it all to me, love me, honey~

subtitles.original: ふう... はあ... ほら、椅子も無くなっちゃった。
subtitles.english: Phew... Oh, the chairs are gone too.

subtitles.original: もうちょっと座らせてほしかった。
subtitles.english: I wanted to sit a little longer.

subtitles.original: はーいみんな！見えてる？聞こえてる？
subtitles.english: Hello everyone! Can you see me? Can you hear me?

subtitles.original: ホロライブ所属の癒し系ハーフエルフ、アキロゼことアキ・ローゼンタールです！
subtitles.english: I'm the healing half-elf from Hololive, Aki Rosenthal, also known as Akirose!

subtitles.original: ハロー、ハロー、アローナ！
subtitles.english: Hello, hello, Alona!

subtitles.original: えー、今回の「アキロゼ生誕祭2026」へようこそ！
subtitles.english: Welcome to the Akirose Birthday Festival 2026!

subtitles.original: ふう... はあ... 早速ね、なんか色々行われていたんですが...
subtitles.english: Phew... right off the bat, there's a lot going on...

subtitles.original: 一体今回のライブはどうなっちゃうのか...
subtitles.english: ...but how is this concert going to turn out?

subtitles.original: ぜひ最後まで必見、お見逃しなくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please stay tuned until the very end, don't miss it!

subtitles.original: 今回のライブのハッシュタグは「#アキロゼ生誕祭2026」、
subtitles.english: The hashtag for today's live is "#アキロゼ生誕祭2026".

subtitles.original: こちらをつけてXにたくさんポストしてね！
subtitles.english: Please post a lot on X with this hashtag!

subtitles.original: もちろん「かわいい」「美しい」のスクショ、アハァン。
subtitles.english: Of course, post your "cute" and "beautiful" screenshots, ah-ha~!

subtitles.original: えー、もたくさん撮って、合わせてポストしてください。
subtitles.english: Please take lots of screenshots and post them too!

subtitles.original: ライブが終わった後、アキロゼ見に行きます！見てね。
subtitles.english: After the concert, Akirose will check them! Look forward to it.

subtitles.original: あ、チャンネル登録もよろしくね！
subtitles.english: Oh, and please subscribe to my channel too!

subtitles.original: オッケー？撮って撮って、はいありがとう！
subtitles.english: Okay? Take lots of pictures. Yes, thank you!

subtitles.original: ほお？お？なんだ？
subtitles.english: Oh? What is this?

subtitles.original: なに、なに、なに？え？
subtitles.english: What, what, what? Huh?

subtitles.original: んー、ていうかここどこなんだろう。
subtitles.english: Wait, where am I anyway?

subtitles.original: お！あんなところにルーレットがある！
subtitles.english: Oh! There's a roulette wheel over there!

subtitles.original: え？回るのかな？
subtitles.english: Huh? Does it spin?

subtitles.original: お、え、ま、回った！え、すごい！
subtitles.english: Oh, wait, it's spinning! Wow, that's amazing!

subtitles.original: もう回った！
subtitles.english: It's already spinning!
